executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with full analysis of design doc drift: 3 priority findings (OpenClaw fictional integration, wrong storage layer, inflated competitive claims), 6 requirements, 5 business scenarios, 5 Gherkin scenarios, 4 scopes.

Created design.md with section-by-section edit plan for docs/smackerel.md: 15 edit groups covering header metadata, §2 principles, §4 OpenClaw superseded header, §6 capture channels, §7 processing pipeline, §8 storage diagram, §14 DDL rewrite (SQLite→PostgreSQL), §17 security, §18 privacy, §19 phased plan, §21.3 competitive matrix audit, §22 connector accuracy (14 committed connectors), §24 glossary. Implementation sequence and verification checklist defined.

Manual cross-check verified docs/smackerel.md (2460 lines) contains the reconciled content claimed by both scopes: header line 14 'Go + Docker Compose (self-hosted)'; §4 SUPERSEDED disclaimer line 419; §8 PostgreSQL+pgvector diagram line 933; §14 PostgreSQL DDL with JSONB/TIMESTAMPTZ at line 1360+; only TOC line 23 still references OpenClaw outside §4 SUPERSEDED block; competitive matrix and §22 connector list audited.

cross_spec_trace_guard_remediation_via_per_class_fixes (Iter 9): Test Plan rows now reference docs/smackerel.md with section pointers; 4 DoD bullets prefixed with 'Scenario SCN-024-NN (title):' for SCN-024-02/03/05/06 to satisfy DoD content-fidelity check. trace-guard PASSED (0 warnings).

Confirmed cmd/core/connectors.go registers 16 connectors (qfDecisionsConn at line 51) while docs/smackerel.md §22.7 + §24-A still claimed 15. R-006 inventory contract owned by spec 024 silently violated since 2026-05-22. Classification of 32 state-transition-guard BLOCKS + 19 artifact-freshness sub-failures + 1 real drift captured in bugs/BUG-024-002-reconcile-artifact-drift/bug.md.

resolvedBugs.title: Residual reconciliation drift from prior sweep rounds: (F1) parent state.json duplicate top-level lastUpdatedAt key; (F2) scopes.md Scope-2 body + SCN-024-04/06 still claimed 15 connectors (omitting qfdecisions) while spec.md/manifest/docs/runtime all say 16
resolvedBugs.resolution: Sweep round 7 of sweep-2026-06-06-r20b (mapped child mode harden-to-doc, parent-expanded) ran the harden probe over spec 024. All 5 framework guards were GREEN at baseline; the probe surfaced 2 LATENT (guard-invisible) findings on the exact documentation-accuracy dimension spec 024 governs. F1 (LOW): parent state.json carried a duplicate top-level lastUpdatedAt — BUG-024-004 added 2026-06-06T00:00:00Z at the header while the legacy 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z key survived after the failures[] array; JSON last-wins silently shadowed the intended value, and the gate suite does not detect duplicate keys. F2 (MEDIUM): scopes.md Scope 2 original body + SCN-024-04/06 Gherkin still claimed '15 connectors' and listed 15 names omitting qfdecisions, contradicting spec.md R-006 (16), scenario-manifest.json SCN-024-06 (16), docs/smackerel.md §22.7 (16), the live 16-connector registry (cmd/core/connectors.go), and scopes.md's own BUG-024-002 addenda (16); traceability maps by scenarioId so the count divergence passed silently. Closed via single BUG-024-005 packet (single Scope 1): F1 — removed the legacy duplicate lastUpdatedAt key + recertified header (certifiedAt 2026-05-28T05:07:51Z→2026-06-06T18:00:00Z, lastUpdatedAt→2026-06-06T18:00:00Z) per the harden recert contract because planning truth scopes.md was edited; F2 — reconciled 8 substantive scopes.md sites 15→16 + inserted qfdecisions alphabetically in SCN-024-06 body, preserving 7 historical/rollback/grep-contract '15' references verbatim. Post-fix: python3 duplicate-key detector reports zero duplicate keys (lastUpdatedAt literal 2→1); all 5 parent guards GREEN (post-cert-spec-edit-guard PASS Gate G088 with certifiedAt=2026-06-06T18:00:00Z; state-transition-guard 🟡 TRANSITION PERMITTED with 3 pre-existing warnings; artifact-lint PASSED; artifact-freshness PASS; traceability PASSED 6/6 with SCN-024-06 fidelity now reading '16 connectors'); bug-folder artifact-lint PASSED; TestConnectorCountContract 4/4 PASS. requiresRevalidation NOT set (would trip G089 on a done spec). Parent spec 024 stays status: done end-to-end; no runtime/schema/NATS/compose/web template/prompt contract/Telegram command/deploy script change. Per round hard rule: NO COMMIT, NO PUSH — all changes left in the working tree for the parent stochastic-quality-sweep / operator.
